Typedefs | Functions
capabilities.h File Reference

Capabilities (list of property sets) for media streams. More...

#include "properties.h"

Go to the source code of this file.

Typedefs

typedef list_t capabilities_t
 List of capabilities (sets of properties).
 

Functions

static capabilities_t * capabilities_new (size_t initial_capacity)
 Create a new capabilities list with an initial capacity.
 
static capabilities_t * capabilities_new_simple (properties_t **properties)
 Create a new capabilities list with a single property.
 
static void capabilities_free (capabilities_t *capabilities, void(*free_func)(void *))
 Free the memory allocated for the capabilities list.
 
static bool capabilities_add (capabilities_t *capabilities, properties_t **properties)
 Add a property to the capabilities list.
 
static properties_t ** capabilities_get (const capabilities_t *capabilities, size_t index)
 Get a property from the capabilities list by index.
 
static bool capabilities_set (const capabilities_t *capabilities, size_t index, properties_t **properties)
 Set a property in the capabilities list by index.
 
static size_t capabilities_capacity (const capabilities_t *capabilities)
 Get the capacity of the capabilities list.
 
static size_t capabilities_size (const capabilities_t *capabilities)
 Get the size of the capabilities list.
 
static bool capabilities_empty (const capabilities_t *capabilities)
 Check if the capabilities list is empty.
 
static void capabilities_clear (capabilities_t *capabilities, void(*free_func)(void *))
 Clear the capabilities list.
 
static capabilities_t * capabilities_duplicate (const capabilities_t *original)
 Duplicate a capabilities list.
 
static void capabilities_iterate (const capabilities_t *capabilities, void(*callback)(properties_t **))
 Iterate over all capability entries and invoke a callback for each.
 
static void capabilities_inspect (const capabilities_t *caps, int(*print_func)(const char *,...), const char *indent)
 Print a human-readable dump of the capabilities list.
 

Detailed Description

Author
IMD Software Team
Attention

Copyright (c) 2026 STMicroelectronics. All rights reserved.

This software is licensed under terms that can be found in the LICENSE file in the root directory of this software component. If no LICENSE file comes with this software, it is provided AS-IS.

Provides capabilities_t (a list_t specialization holding properties_t pointers) together with creation, access, duplication, iteration and inspection helpers used during format negotiation.

Function Documentation

◆ capabilities_add()

static bool capabilities_add ( capabilities_t * capabilities,
properties_t ** properties )
inlinestatic
Parameters
capabilitiesA pointer to the capabilities list.
propertiesA pointer to the properties to be added.
Returns
true if the property was added successfully, false otherwise.

static size_t capabilities_capacity ( const capabilities_t * capabilities)
inlinestatic
Parameters
capabilitiesA pointer to the capabilities list.
Returns
The capacity of the capabilities list.

static void capabilities_clear ( capabilities_t * capabilities,
void(* free_func )(void *) )
inlinestatic
Parameters
capabilitiesA pointer to the capabilities list.
free_funcA function pointer to free the properties.

◆ capabilities_duplicate()

static capabilities_t * capabilities_duplicate ( const capabilities_t * original)
inlinestatic
Parameters
originalA pointer to the original capabilities list.
Returns
A pointer to the duplicated capabilities list, or NULL if duplication failed.

static bool capabilities_empty ( const capabilities_t * capabilities)
inlinestatic
Parameters
capabilitiesA pointer to the capabilities list.
Returns
true if the capabilities list is empty, false otherwise.

Parameters
capabilitiesA pointer to the capabilities list to be freed.
free_funcA function pointer to free the properties.

indexThe index of the property to get.

Parameters
[in]capsPointer to the capabilities list.
[in]print_funcPrintf-like callback used for output.
[in]indentPrefix string prepended to each line.
